title: One Week National Level FDP in Hybrid Mode on “Connecting Indian Knowledge Systems to Engineering Practices: A Way Towards Viksit Bharat 2047” – BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women
text:
One Week National Level FDP in Hybrid Mode on “Connecting Indian Knowledge Systems to Engineering Practices: A Way Towards Viksit Bharat 2047” – BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women

October 10, 2025
Post category:
Awards
/
flash new
/
News
BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women, Hyderabad has received the prestigious  “
Best CSI Supporting Principal
Award
”. The award was received by the principal
Dr.K.V.N Sunitha
from  The Computer Society of India (CSI), Hyderabad Chapter.
This recognition is a tribute to the institution for the unwavering commitment in fostering a culture of academic excellence, research, and the practical applications of engineering principles.
